name: Vanilla Ice Cream-Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine evaporated milk and sugar replacement in a bowl. Beat well until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add whole milk and vanilla extract to the mixture. Beat well.
3. Add eggs to the mixture. Beat the eggs into the milk mixture vigorously.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker. Freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
